critical_issues.title: Required APP-03 settings were not placeholder values
critical_issues.description: local.settings.json.example used concrete TRAPI and container values instead of placeholders required by AC #6.

suggestions.title: Add tests for placeholder values
suggestions.description: Ensure APP-03 env var keys exist and use placeholder-style values to prevent regressions.

suggestions.title: Improve PROMPT_PATH assertion robustness
suggestions.description: Suggested importing trapi_client.PROMPT_PATH directly; not applied because importing trapi_client in this repo state raises ModuleNotFoundError for missing src package during test collection.
